title: Scelochilus minutus
taxonomy: Scelochilus minutus is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This family is further divided into 763 genera, with Scelochilus being one of them. The genus Scelochilus is a small group of orchids, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Scelochilus minutus is a part of the broader classification system of orchids, which includes kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species.

benefits: Scelochilus minutus is a species of orchid, and as with many plants in this family, it may have potential health benefits. properties: Scelochilus minutus is a species of orchid that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic effects.
